OpenAI 今天发布了 ChatGPT 的“工作区智能体”（Workspace Agents）功能，让企业用户可以在 ChatGPT 里直接搭建能跨工具、跨团队自动执行工作流的 AI 智能体。

这个功能的核心思路是：你描述一项工作的逻辑和规则，ChatGPT

We're hiring top-tier Forward Deployed Engineers/Strategists at Varick. Apply if you:

- are technical
- want to talk to and build for customers
- enjoy untangling messy operational problems at enterprise companies
- want in on a rocketship early with a killer team

Based in SF

GPT-Image-2 can be used to make full panoramas 🤯

Prompt for a "360 equirectangular image" of a specific place - I asked for Akihibara at night.

Then I had my OpenClaw agent build a viewer in the browser so I could easily upload the image, pan around, and zoom. https://t.co/Uck5UDIeZZ
